page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.20xlarge is a KVM-hypervised virtual machine instance configured with 80 dedicated vCPUs and 80 physical cores, utilizing a 1-to-1 thread-to-core ratio. The instance is powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture.

This instance features 704.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 8.8 GB of RAM per core. For storage-heavy workloads, it includes 19,198 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. No graphics processing units are included in this configuration.

The ecs.i2ne.20xlarge offers high resource density, combining substantial memory capacity with a massive local SSD storage footprint. This hardware profile is designed for data-intensive operations where local storage speed and capacity are critical. However, the lack of hyperthreading means multi-threaded scaling is limited strictly to the 80 physical cores, and the absence of GPU acceleration makes it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated machine learning tasks.

Given the massive local SSD storage and high memory-to-CPU ratio, this instance is optimized for large-scale databases, big data analytics, high-performance storage nodes, and memory-intensive enterprise applications requiring fast local read and write access.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.20xlarge is a KVM-hypervised instance designed for storage-intensive and memory-heavy workloads. It features 80 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. The hardware configuration includes 704.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.8 GB of RAM per core, alongside a massive 19,198 GB of local SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. Lacking GPU acceleration, this instance is optimized for high-density resource allocation. It is best suited for large-scale databases, data warehousing, big data processing, and enterprise applications requiring substantial local storage capacity and high memory availability.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.20xlarge is a KVM instance featuring 80 Intel Xeon cores, 704 GB RAM, and 19,198 GB of local SSD storage, optimized for large-scale databases and data-intensive workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity storage and memory-optimized instance featuring eighty dedicated cores and over nineteen terabytes of local SSD storage.
